text:
Created attachment 189882
pgmanage-10-1.0

The pgmanage utility is  a tool to make managing your PostgreSQL database 
fast and easy. It provides web access and can be used on a tablet, or even 
on a phone.

WWW: https://github.com/pgManage/pgManage

Poudriere: 10, 11 i386/amd64 OK
Portlint -Nabt OK (irrelevant warning for NLS)

Tested@work
